items.title: Direct Habit Growth Release
items.description: Release focused on faster homepage refresh, stronger newsletter recirculation, and more personalized return journeys for habitual readers.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the number of deliberate visits per active reader.
Increase the share of readers who come back repeatedly during the week.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Turn more repeat readers into recognized audience relationships.

productBricks.change: Improve homepage assembly speed and repeat-visit modules.
Improve newsletter send targeting and editorial recirculation.

deliveryChannels.change: Release improved entry surfaces to owned websites.
Release new newsletter blocks and send logic.

items.title: Subscriber Value and Bundle Release
items.description: Release focused on premium packaging, bundle activation, and lower friction across paywall, billing, and app entitlement flows.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce avoidable churn by clarifying value and access.

productBricks.change: Improve premium messaging, bundle access, and entitlement checks.
Improve renewal recovery and payment-failure handling.

deliveryChannels.change: Release new entitlement sync flows for bundle partners.
Release app entitlement and premium upsell improvements.

items.title: Campaign Yield and Measurement Release
items.description: Release focused on audience match quality, sponsorship packaging, and stronger campaign outcome reporting for advertisers.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase the share of booked campaigns that reach the intended high-value audience.
Increase the percentage of campaigns with credible outcome reporting.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase renewal and expansion from direct advertisers.

productBricks.change: Improve first-party audience packaging and pricing logic.
Improve campaign pacing, placement controls, and viewability diagnostics.
Improve advertiser-facing measurement definitions and reporting.

deliveryChannels.change: Release new sales planning and reporting views.

items.title: Breaking News Workbench Release
items.description: Release focused on faster live updates, reusable story packages, and better social and app distribution readiness.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce elapsed time from story ready to published across major surfaces.
Increase the share of lead stories launched with complete packaging for search, social, app, and homepage.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase output leverage from the same editorial effort.

productBricks.change: Improve workflow shortcuts and publish-state visibility.
